title: Track and navigate notebook runs with the new cell execution minimap
body:
Use the cell execution minimap to track your notebook’s progress at a glance. The minimap appears in the right margin and shows each cell’s execution state (skipped, queued, running, success, or error). Hover to see cell details, or click to jump directly to a cell.

For information about using the cell execution minimap, see [Navigate the Databricks notebook and file editor](/aws/en/notebooks/notebook-editor).

ref_links.text: Navigate the Databricks notebook and file editor
